id.description: Unique reverse-DNS id; also the install folder name.

version.description: Plugin semver; must increase when packageUrl changes.

apiVersion.description: Glyph plugin-API version. Unstable until 1.0: while the API major is 0, plugins must state the exact host version (currently 0.16.0) and a caret grants nothing; caret ranges apply from 1.0.0.

permissions.description: Capabilities the plugin declares; shown to users in the install consent prompt.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the packageUrl zip; Glyph verifies the download against it before installing, and only the manifest-declared files are extracted.

sandbox.description: Run the plugin in an isolated worker (no DOM, network fenced to its network: permissions). Only the non-UI API subset is available; see the docs.

packageUrl.description: HTTPS URL of the plugin's release zip (manifest.json plus the manifest-declared files), pinned to a tag.
